Fluid forecast · model reliability sandbox

Garbage in, garbage out — build the dataset, watch the forecast

Pick an asset, then strip its data down — take fewer oil samples, skip lab tests — and watch the same trained model try to forecast it. The panel on the right tells you how far you can trust what comes back, and why.

      measured ◇ model forecast ○ what actually happened
      Every number here is a real output of the trained model — a pooled HistGradient­Boosting survival & forecasting model — precomputed over every combination these controls can make (each asset × sample counts × 7 test toggles) and looked up live; the browser can't run the model, so it can't fake one either. This is a public demo: every asset here is synthetic, with invented data — no real customer’s information is shown. Explore how the model’s forecast and reliability shift as you add or withhold data. Trust score blends how complete the lab panel is with how much history the model has to learn a trend from.
